title: Bedwars Zero
description: better gameplay at pvp game modes
body:
# **what is this ?**

**this is a resource pack made for minecraft minigames based on pvp like:**
- Bedwars 
- Skywars 
- FFA
- Practice
and more...

# 1. **Changes:**
- terracota blocks textures
- wool blocks textures
- some blocks texture
- leather armor texture
- beds texture
- glass color textures
- tiny and simple swords, bow and arrow textures 
- custom sky color 
- black and white outline blocks and hitbox (only on 1.21.5-1.21.10 version)
- custom sound pack 
- small shield
- invisable moon/sun

# 2. **Features**

  this pack can boost your fps a bit because of the simple and low textres resolution

# 3. **Requirements**

- If you want to use the Custom Sky you need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) or [skyboxify Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)
- disable moon and sun for better night overly

  


  credits are in the resourcepack files
